Hero.name: Mohamed Zaher
Hero.subtitle: Entrepreneur • CTO • Full-Stack Engineer
Hero.tagline: Merging Tech & Business for Scalable Growth.
Hero.description: Driving business growth through strategy, partnerships, and execution. CTO at ETS, founder at Tapix Electronics & Dida Silver, account manager for Amazon Prime, DHL, Keeta, HungerStation, Ninja, and NexTracker through Energize Logistics. Open for investments, partnerships, and the next bold bet.

About.title: Engineer by craft. |Entrepreneur by mindset.
About.lead: I'm Mohamed Zaher — a tech entrepreneur driving business growth through strategy, partnerships, and execution. I bring an entrepreneurial mindset that combines commercial vision with deep technology understanding — turning market opportunities into well-structured businesses, platforms, and long-term value, with technology positioned as a core enabler. CTO at ETS, founder at Tapix Electronics and Dida Silver, BD consultant at Gulf Trend, and account manager for Amazon Prime, DHL, Keeta, HungerStation, Ninja, and NexTracker through Energize Logistics. I'm always exploring new ventures, investments, and strategic partnerships — if you have capital looking for a founder, a problem looking for a builder, or a vision looking for execution, let's talk.
About.quote: Code solves problems. Business scales solutions.
